description_long: This is a modern, minimalist desk lamp with a rectangular base and a slender, vertical support column that transitions into a flat, elongated lamp head. The lamp head is angled downward, suggesting a focused light distribution ideal for task lighting. The design features a two-tone color scheme, with a darker central section on the support column, possibly indicating a touch or control area. The lamp's surfaces are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing a sleek, contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure appears to be made from molded plastic or metal, with no visible fasteners or joints. Its compact footprint and clean lines make it suitable for urban workspaces, study areas, or bedside tables.
description: A sleek, minimalist desk lamp with a rectangular base, slender upright support, and an angled, flat lamp head in a two-tone color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular base, vertical support, and the flat lamp head with a visible two-tone section on the column.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thin profile, the angled lamp head, and the overall slimness of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the lamp, showing the continuous support column and the flat back of the lamp head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the side profile, emphasizing the lamp head's downward angle and the clean, uninterrupted lines.
